source: Il portale giuridico online per i professionisti – Diritto.it
summary: Italy condemned by EU court for ATA staff hiring system violating EU law. Limited dev relevance—may signal stricter EU scrutiny on automated hiring systems. Developers building HR/recruitment tools should ensure EU compliance.

title: Equo compenso agli editori: la Corte UE conferma il modello italiano, ma ne delimita i confini
source: Il portale giuridico online per i professionisti – Diritto.it
summary: EU Court upheld Italy's fair compensation model for publishers but set limits. Matters for devs building AI/content platforms needing licensing. Review EU content rules before scraping.

title: AI Act, accordo sul Digital Omnibus: più tempo alle imprese e nuove regole sui deepfake
source: Il portale giuridico online per i professionisti – Diritto.it
summary: EU agreed on Digital Omnibus tweaks to AI Act: extended compliance deadlines for businesses and new deepfake rules. Developers get more time to adapt but must implement deepfake labeling. Review your AI system's risk classification and disclosure mechanisms now.

title: Stipendi, cosa cambia per le aziende dal 7 giugno: arriva la trasparenza retributiva UE
source: Il portale giuridico online per i professionisti – Diritto.it
summary: EU directive 2023/970 mandates pay transparency for companies starting June 7. Devs at EU firms gain right to salary range info. Review your comp against new disclosed benchmarks.
